text:
There was once a girl named Laurel. She loved flowers. Every spring she'd take a long walk to an old field behind her house. There was just one big pink rose there.

Every time Laurel picked the rose, the bird she loved most would perch on it. She'd watch for hours.

One day the bird decided to stay. Laurel named him Mister Rosewood.

They grew old together. She lost Mister Rosewood. It was spring.

She went to the old field. There wasn't a single pink flower. Maybe one day... Maybe not.

She walked home under a cloud.

Next spring, she found Mister Rosewood there. They fluttered all day long.

They slept under an old oak. Laurel sometimes thought about just picking one. But Mister Rose had saved that one.

They lived happily ever after.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
